title: 20 TidyZ Heavy-Duty Rubble Sacks. Made from 100% Recycled Plastic. Extra Strong and Thick Builders Bags. For DIY Construction, Building Site Debris, Garden Waste. 32L Blue Waste Bags
features: EXTRA THICK HEAVY DUTY CONSTRUCTION - Professional grade rubble sacks made with extra thick recycled plastic for superior tear and puncture resistance. Perfect for sharp building debris, bricks, hardcore, aggregate, soil, and heavy garden waste without ripping.

100% RECYCLED & RECYCLABLE - Environmentally responsible choice for trade and DIY projects. Each 32L blue rubble bag is made from 100% recycled plastic and can be recycled again, reducing landfill waste while maintaining exceptional strength.

LARGE 32 LITRE CAPACITY - Generous size handles substantial loads while remaining manageable to carry and transport. Suitable for filling with rubble, broken tiles, gravel, sand, and other building materials. Fits standard waste collection requirements.

VERSATILE 20 PACK FOR ANY PROJECT - Ideal for builders, landscapers, and homeowners. Use for construction site waste, renovation debris, garden clearance, soil removal, concrete waste, plaster, wood offcuts, and general building materials. Perfect for skips or waste collection.

TRUSTED TIDYZ QUALITY - Reliable British brand delivering trade-quality waste solutions. These blue builders bags are designed for professional tradespeople and serious DIY enthusiasts who need dependable, strong sacks that won't let them down mid-job.
description: Product Description Built Strong. Built Sustainable. Built Tough TidyZ heavy-duty rubble sacks combine extra thick construction with 100% recycled plastic for unmatched durability. With a 32L capacity, these tear and puncture resistant bags handle tough construction debris effortlessly. Recyclable and eco-friendly, they're the smart choice for builders and DIY enthusiasts alike. 100% Recycled & Recyclable Every sack is made entirely from recycled plastic and can be recycled again. Reduce your environmental impact without compromising on strength. Extra Thick & Tear-Resistant Industrial-grade thickness prevents punctures and tears, even with sharp debris like bricks, glass, or metal. Perfect 32L Capacity The ideal size—large enough for serious jobs but light enough to carry when full. No more overfilled, impossible-to-lift bags. Multi-Purpose From garden clearances to full renovations, these bags handle rubble, soil, plaster, wood, and general building waste. Eco-Friendly Strength for Your Toughest Jobs TidyZ Heavy-Duty Rubble Sacks offer a robust solution for your most demanding projects. Crafted from 100% recycled plastic, these 32L blue bags combine environmental responsibility with exceptional durability. Perfect for DIY enthusiasts and professional builders alike, our extra-thick sacks resist tears and punctures, easily handling sharp debris, bricks, and heavy garden waste. With a generous capacity and manageable size, these versatile bags are ideal for construction sites, home renovations, and garden clearances. Choose TidyZ for reliable, eco-conscious waste management that doesn't compromise on strength or quality. Why choose TidyZ? Why 32L instead of larger sizes? 32 litres is the sweet spot. Large enough for substantial waste, but when filled with heavy materials like rubble or soil, it remains manageable to lift and carry. Larger bags often become dangerously heavy. Will these bags split with sharp debris? Our extra-thick construction is specifically designed to resist punctures from sharp edges like broken bricks, glass shards, and metal offcuts. Unlike standard bags, TidyZ sacks won't let you down mid-job. Are they really eco-friendly? Absolutely. Made from 100% recycled plastic and fully recyclable after use. You're choosing sustainability without sacrificing the strength you need for tough jobs. Who uses TidyZ? Professional builders, landscapers, and serious DIY enthusiasts rely on TidyZ for consistent quality and performance. When the job matters, trust matters too.
